source_pr.title: planner: fix an unstable explain test case
source_pr.body:

Issue Number: ref #35240

Problem Summary: planner: fix an unstable explain test case 

### What is changed and how it works?

planner: fix an unstable explain test case 

### Check List

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note

```

symptoms: `explaintest` output is unstable because the chosen plan/EXPLAIN output depends on the session `tidb_cost_model_version`.
failure_signature: EXPLAIN output mismatch in `cmd/explaintest` when `tidb_cost_model_version` differs.
root_cause_explanation: The `explaintest` case compares an exact EXPLAIN output. That output depends on the cost model version, and `tidb_cost_model_version` can differ across environments or be affected by surrounding statements in the same test session. The fix pins `tidb_cost_model_version=2` before running the EXPLAIN in `explain_complex` and then resets it back to `1`, making the output deterministic for this test.
fix_pattern: Pin plan-affecting session variables (e.g. `tidb_cost_model_version`) around explaintest queries and restore afterwards to make exact EXPLAIN assertions deterministic.

evidence: evidence: planner: fix an unstable explain test case
